summary: Excellent front‑of‑house recording with strong, thick sound and a very good, exciting 1984 performance despite occasional sloppiness.
review: The FOB capture is praised as ‘very strong and thick’ with excellent imaging, making the audio quality essentially flawless. The show itself is described as a very good (vg) performance that’s generally exciting, though it has brief moments of typical 1984 sloppiness. Overall the recording and music combine to give an enjoyable listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review rates both the show (vg) and the recording (excellent) highly; weighted average yields ~4.3 stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑house mix described as very strong, thick, with excellent stereo imaging and no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Very good show overall; exciting energy despite a few moments of typical 1984 sloppiness.
